inputs.question: What percentage of users are active?

expected.summary: According to the data, **89.2%** of users (892 out of 1000) are active while **10.8%** are inactive (108 out of 1000).

notes: User explicitly asks about 'percentage' - indicates part-to-whole relationship. Small number of categories (2) with count data is ideal for pie chart. Exclude the 'total' row using x_rows to focus on the breakdown.
